perShot.description: Father and daughter sitting at the desk with a big title overlay.
Intercut close-ups of father explaining rules and daughter reacting dismissively.
perShot.promptTemplate: Intercut close-ups of {character_a} with {emotion_a} and {character_b} with {emotion_b}, {style}.

perShot.description: POV shot of a phone screen showing a prank involving garlic and a treasure basin.
Camera follows daughter laughing as father reacts in the background.
perShot.promptTemplate: {camera_move} shot of {character_b} with {emotion_c} while {character_a} reacts in {scene}, {style}.

variables.scene: traditional corporate office with wooden furniture
variables.text_overlay: large bold text asking about family rules
variables.style: clean interior lighting, social media vlog aesthetic
